app.name: PokéRegion Explorer
app.title: PokéRegion Explorer - Discover Pokemon by Region
app.description: Discover Pokemon by their natural habitats. Browse regions, explore locations, and find encounter details for your favorite Pokemon.

hero.title: PokéRegion
hero.subtitle: Explorer
hero.description: Discover Pokemon by their natural habitats. Browse regions, explore locations, and find encounter details for your favorite Pokemon.

regions.title: Regions
regions.subtitle: {{count}} regions available
regions.explore: Explore locations, routes, and encounter wild Pokemon

regionInfo.kanto: The first region introduced in the Pokemon series, featuring iconic locations like Pallet Town and Mt. Moon.
regionInfo.johto: A region west of Kanto featuring the legendary Pokemon Ho-Oh and Lugia, with rich history and culture.
regionInfo.hoenn: A region with diverse environments including volcanic areas, oceans, and vast routes.
regionInfo.sinnoh: A region based on Hokkaido, Japan, featuring Mt. Coronet at its center.
regionInfo.unova: A diverse region far from Kanto featuring a large metropolitan area.
regionInfo.kalos: A region inspired by France, featuring Mega Evolution and the iconic Prism Tower.
regionInfo.alola: A tropical archipelago region featuring Alolan forms and island trials.
regionInfo.galar: A region based on the United Kingdom featuring Dynamax and Gigantamax.
regionInfo.paldea: An open-world region featuring the Terastal phenomenon.

location.noEncountersDesc: This location doesn't have any recorded wild Pokemon encounters in the database.

pokemon.noLocationData: No location data available for this Pokemon

common.errorDescription: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
